author: xryul
description: Reveal invisible Unicode characters and suspicious indentation in notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: xRyul
manifest.description: Reveal invisible Unicode characters and suspicious indentation in notes.
manifest.name: Gremlins

name: Gremlins

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Gutter layout fix

- Keep the editor body aligned when Gremlins gutter icons are enabled.
- Keep Gremlin icons visible and clickable with line numbers enabled or disabled.
- Position icons in Obsidian's existing gutter spacing without changing the document width.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.1

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Click-to-fix gremlins

- Add an opt-in setting to fix every gremlin on a line by clicking its gutter icon.
- Normalize spacing and punctuation, remove flagged invisible controls, and convert mixed indentation to Markdown-safe spaces.
- Show a brief explosion animation when a gremlin is fixed.
- Add **Gremlins: Fix current line** for keyboard and touch workflows.
- Apply each line fix in one undoable editor transaction.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.2.0

releases.author: xRyul
releases.description:
## Initial release

- Highlight zero-width characters, bidirectional controls, non-breaking spaces, soft hyphens, and related Unicode gremlins.
- Detect leading indentation that mixes tabs and spaces.
- Show severity-coloured editor decorations and gutter icons.
- Display character names, Unicode code points, and severity on hover.
- Optionally highlight typographic punctuation.
- Inspect the gremlin at the cursor from the command palette.
releases.name: Gremlins 0.1.0
